summary: All three requirements (REQ-13, REQ-14, REQ-15) appear to be implemented in the diff. The GPS capture bug is fixed in useGeolocation.ts and AssetEntryForm.tsx, the deleteAsset backend function is added to main.mo, and the frontend delete capability including confirmation dialog, toasts, and useDeleteAsset mutation is added to AdminDashboard.tsx and useQueries.ts.
